resources.string: Your clean streak and next milestone, with Cal keeping watch.
One tap locks your phone down for 15 minutes when an urge hits.
Lets Calmly close apps you\'ve chosen to block the instant they open — the enforcement behind App Lock. Calmly reads only which app came to the foreground, never anything on your screen.
Slams your blocked apps shut so a moment of weakness can\'t become a relapse.
